name: Meshflow Acquisition Corp
business: Meshflow Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated to effect a merger with one or more businesses, with a focus on acquiring a company operating at the infrastructure layer of the blockchain and digital asset ecosystem. It has no operations and has generated no revenue. It is a shell company.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry, but expect to target opportunities and companies that are operating at the infrastructure layer of the blockchain and digital asset ecosystem.
